stemHtml: Regarding the centre of pressure (CP) and aerodynamic centre (AC) of a positively cambered (asymmetrical) aerofoil, which of the following statements is true assuming low angles of attack?

options.a: The centre of pressure is aft of the aerodynamic centre.
options.b: The centre of pressure is at the aerodynamic centre.
options.c: The centre of pressure is forward of the aerodynamic centre.
options.d: The centre of pressure moves forward and then aft.
